title: Improved readability in image json output
body:
Changes made in json output to improve readability of
podman images output.

Fixes: https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/5001

Signed-off-by: Kunal Kushwaha <kunal.kushwaha@gmail.com>

comments.body:
Looks like some of the tests need to be modified.

Changes look good to me, though.
